# AnythingFromAmerica.com

## What we do
AnythingFromAmerica.com is a U.S. export broker based in Dallas, Texas. We source, ship, and finance American products for international buyers in 60+ countries worldwide.

## Our services
- Export brokerage for any American-made product
- Aviation: private jets, commercial aircraft, helicopters, drones, and parts
- Industrial equipment: heavy machinery, manufacturing equipment, tools
- Medical devices and hospital equipment
- Automotive: vehicles, parts, and accessories
- Consumer electronics and branded goods
- Agricultural machinery and equipment

## Financing
We offer Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) payment plans for qualified buyers on orders over $50,000 USD. Down payment of 20-30%, with terms of 12-60 months.

## Contact
- Email: info@anythingfromamerica.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +1 (817) 715-1156
- Location: Dallas, Texas, USA
- Response time: within 24 hours on business days

## Who we serve
Global businesses, importers, government agencies, and individual buyers who want to purchase American goods and have them delivered internationally.
